qa_pair.question: List all connected servers and count the number of tools provided by each server. Which server provides the most tools?
qa_pair.answer: Need to use the list-servers tool to get the server list, then use list-all-tools-in-server tool for each server to count the number of tools, and finally compare to find the server with the most tools.

qa_pair.question: Find all tools whose name or description contains the keyword "search". Which servers are these tools distributed on?
qa_pair.answer: Use the find-tools tool with pattern set to "search" and search scope set to "both", then count the servers where the tools are located based on the returned results.

qa_pair.question: Get the complete schema information of the system tool named "list-servers", including input parameters and output format.
qa_pair.answer: Use the get-tool tool with the tool name "list-servers" to get its complete schema information.

qa_pair.question: Find all servers with online status and check if any of them provide tools containing the keywords "math" or "calculation".
qa_pair.answer: First use the list-servers tool to get the list of online servers, then use the find-tools-in-server tool to search for tools containing the specified keywords on each online server.

qa_pair.question: Get the total number of tools from all servers and calculate the average number of tools provided per server.
qa_pair.answer: Use list-servers to get the server list, then use list-all-tools-in-server to count the number of tools for each server, and finally calculate the total and average.

qa_pair.question: Find all servers that support the "stdio" transport protocol and list all tool names of these servers.
qa_pair.answer: First use the list-servers tool to filter servers using the stdio transport protocol, then use the list-all-tools-in-server tool to list the tool names for each qualified server.

qa_pair.question: Get the input schema of the tool named "find-servers". What search options does this tool support?
qa_pair.answer: Use the get-tool tool to get detailed information about the find-servers tool and check its input parameters and search options.

qa_pair.question: Find all tools whose description contains the keyword "database" and display them grouped by server.
qa_pair.answer: Use the find-tools tool with pattern set to "database" and search scope set to "description", then group the results by server.

qa_pair.question: Get detailed information about the "list-files" tool on the server "local-mcp-server" and use this tool to list the files in the current directory.
qa_pair.answer: First use the get-tool tool to get detailed information about the "list-files" tool on the "local-mcp-server", then use the call-tool tool to invoke this tool to list the files in the current directory.

qa_pair.question: Find all tools whose name starts with "get-" and list the complete name and server location of these tools.
qa_pair.answer: Use the find-tools tool with pattern set to "^get-" and search scope set to "name", then list the matching tool names and their server locations.
